milestoneTitle: Phase M9.19a.9 — Tap-to-expand progressive disclosure for every .dash-tile. Tap a condensed tile, it grows into a floating detail card at higher z-index over a dimmed backdrop, showing the full eyebrow / title / status / summary / external link (for courses) / inventory (for projects) at larger, easier-to-tap sizes. Single primary CTA at the bottom does the real action (Start / Continue / Review lesson, Open course new tab, Modify draft / Open source, Start new project, Open project). Backdrop tap / close-X / Esc dismisses. FLIP-style origin: the expanded element animates into place from the tapped tile's centerpoint (translate + scale, fully compositor — no layout thrash). Honors 'transforms are exclusive': the expanded element is a fresh DOM node so no prior motion carries over, and reduced-motion disables the scale transition. Cascades to every .dash-tile instance — Learn list (lesson / course / draft), dashboard Learn panel, dashboard Projects panel (real + __example__ dummy). Swipe-to-delete on drafts still works (tap on a tile inside an open swipe wrap closes the swipe instead of expanding). Grab-handle drag still works (bails from the tile click via closest check).
